name: Creamy Chilled Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Graham Cracker Crumbs, sugar, and margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form pan.
2. In a bowl, soften the gelatin in cold water. Stir over low heat until dissolved.
3. Mix the cream cheese and sugar with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
4. Chill the mixture until it is slightly thickened. Gently fold in the whipped cream.
5. Pour the cheesecake batter into the prepared pan.
6. Chill until firm.
7. Before serving, top with strawberry halves.
